meaning: adj.来自东南的,往东南的adv.来自东南,往东南
examples: When the southeasterly blows it provides a long and barrelling right-hand break that has experienced surfers paddling furiously to catch a ride.
The results show that typhoon intensity can have influence on the water vapor transport to mid-latitude area by the southeasterly jet on the east of the typhoon.
Away from the main range of Mt. Xixiabangma and without clear incised valley, local circulation is insignificant and the whole glacier were covered by southerly and southeasterly.
Aiding in the evaporation are the prevailing onshore northwesterly winds during the day (shamal), and the offshore southeasterly winds during the night.
